description: Sector overlay for U.S. banks, non-bank financial technology providers, payment services, broker/dealer-adjacent fintech, lending platforms, and customer financial-data documentation.

metadata.scope: United States-only sector overlay controls for Banking and Fintech. Intended to be used with core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official U.S. federal regulatory sources and widely used U.S. model/professional sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance. State-specific requirements may apply.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

rules.title: BSA/AML program evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for BSA/AML, customer identification, beneficial ownership, sanctions screening, CTR, or SAR evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: GLBA/customer-information safeguards evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for written information security program and customer information safeguards language.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Consumer financial disclosure or UDAAP control evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for disclosures, fees, APR, consumer complaints, UDAAP, or fair lending controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Electronic funds transfer or payments error-resolution evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for EFTA/Regulation E, unauthorized transfers, error resolution, or payment dispute language.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: SEC Reg S-P customer-information controls are present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for privacy notice, safeguarding customer information, incident response, or customer notification evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
